name: objetos-ar-reinduccion
description: MVP WebAR (Three.js + WebXR) para visor de objetos 3D - reinduccion corporativa

scripts.compress: gltf-transform optimize assets/Max_FCV.glb assets/optimized/Max_FCV.glb --compress draco --texture-compress webp --texture-size 1024 --simplify true --simplify-ratio 0.5 --simplify-error 0.001
